title: barleria longiflora
intro: Barleria longiflora, also known as the long-flowered firecracker plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Barleria longiflora include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
